hostCollection.label: Host Collection
hostCollection.description: The collection which contains this data.
hostCollection.helpText: Changing the host collection will clear any fields you may have entered data into.

notAllowedToCreateDataset: You do not have permissions to create a dataset within this collection.

template.label: Dataset Template
template.description: The dataset template which prepopulates info into the form automatically.
template.helpText: Changing the template will clear any fields you may have entered data into.
